title: Better Adventures+: Expanded
description: Better Adventures+, plus the new Iris and Distant Horizons support, and a few optimization mods.
body:
**Please dont go bothering Flowstates Discord for support for this modpack.**

Better Adventures+ is an amazing vanilla-plus modpack, but I felt it was lacking in a few areas. Plus, the Distant Horizons and Iris support seen in Flowstates videos isn`t even present in the modpack. So, I added that, as well as a couple extra mods that still keep the spirit of the original. Enjoy!
